description_long: This machine gun features a robust, metallic construction with a cylindrical main body and a prominent, elongated barrel. The central section includes a complex assembly of gears and mechanical components, suggesting a high rate of fire and possible automatic operation. The rear of the gun is fitted with a wide, flat stock that appears to be made of metal, providing stability during use. The front section is dominated by a thick, reinforced barrel with visible cooling fins and a muzzle device. There is a visible mounting bracket or support structure beneath the main body, likely for attachment to a vehicle or fixed emplacement. The overall finish is dark, with a worn, industrial appearance and hints of copper or bronze patina.
description: A heavy, metallic machine gun with a cylindrical barrel, complex central mechanism, and a wide, flat metal stock. The finish is dark and industrial, with visible wear and mechanical details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the machine gun, highlighting the cylindrical barrel, central gear assembly, and wide flat stock.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the circular barrel opening and the symmetrical arrangement of the central mechanism.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the barrel, stock, and mounting bracket.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the flat, wide stock and the back end of the central mechanism.
attribute_barrel_type: heavy cylindrical barrel with visible cooling fins
attribute_stock_design: wide flat metal stock with a slightly curved end
